case_title: WILLIAM DENNIS VS. BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT, INC.,

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENNIS, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $81,445.46 PRINCIPAL, $577.39 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $82,432.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM DENNIS' MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER IS GRANTED. THE MOVING PARTY PRESENTED AT THE HEARING A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWING TIMELY SERVICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
